description:
What: In build_fn_signature (ir_codegen.rs), when a fn's any-key spec has a result Descr that pins to exactly one HeapKind, set return_reprs[sid] = ArgRepr::Dst(k).

Source of the result Descr: read module_types.effective_returns[(fn_id, spec_key)] — landed on main as fz-i82.2 (PR #12, fz-ul4.43 follow-up). This is the LFP of per-spec return Descrs, already consumed by codegen at ir_codegen.rs:2385 and by @spec / @abi rendering. No duplication of the return-type join logic.

Classifier: Descr -> Option<HeapKind>. Pins iff the Descr is a single concrete shape (e.g. Tuple{arity:2}, VecI64, ProcBin, Closure, etc.). Anything polymorphic, any-typed, or halt-only stays None (uniform path).

Invariant: never emitted on extern signatures (asserted).

Why: Single decision point. Everything downstream (C2/C3/C4/D1/D2) reads return_reprs. Riding on effective_returns means we inherit any future typer improvements automatically.

CLIF impact: unchanged (no lowering consumes Dst yet — C2 turns it on).

Tests:
- unit test for the Descr -> HeapKind classifier (pins on single shapes, None on unions / any / halt-only).
- golden assertion that selected stdlib fns get Dst ABI in their any-key spec.
- assertion that externs never receive Dst.
title: fz-dps.C1: per-spec result Descr -> HeapKind classifier
